name: RB2B Website Visitor → Enrichment

parameters.functionCode:
console.log('RB2B visitor without email — cannot enrich');
return [$input.first()];

notes:
Receives de-anonymized website visitors from RB2B and forwards to Master Dashboard enrichment pipeline.

Setup:
1. In RB2B dashboard → Integrations → Webhooks
2. Add webhook URL: {N8N_BASE_URL}/webhook/rb2b-visitor-webhook
3. Set RB2B_WEBHOOK_SECRET in both RB2B and N8N environment variables
4. Company is auto-detected from the page URL domain
